_doc: Samasa (compound) trainer weights (H948). MG ruling 14-07-2026: teach the transparent types (karmadharaya, tatpurusa) before the harder ones (bahuvrihi, dvandva) -- this ORDER, not just a formula, must live here, visibly tunable, NOT hard-coded in Python. build_samasa_trainer.py reads this file (override with --weights <file>).
